name: Login.gov e-Signature
description: United States Login.gov eID provider, contributed into esign:provider — sandboxed. Login.gov is an OIDC redirect flow (not QR/PIN polling), so this provider surfaces US in the picker and hands the actual login off to the auth_sso OIDC bridge.

settings.label: Login.gov Client ID
settings.help: OIDC client id registered with Login.gov.

settings.label: Login.gov Redirect URI
settings.help: OIDC redirect URI registered with Login.gov.
